title: La Traviata
description: Verdi's heartbreaking masterpiece follows the ill-fated romance between Violetta, a celebrated Parisian courtesan, and Alfredo, the country gentleman who loves her. A breathtaking night of arias you'll carry with you forever.

title: The Magic Flute
description: Mozart's enchanting fairy-tale opera dazzles with its coloratura fireworks, comedic warmth, and timeless themes of love, wisdom, and courage. A perfect evening for the whole family.

title: Summer Scenes: Opera Highlights Concert
description: An outdoor celebration of the season's finest aria moments performed under the stars. Free admission — bring a blanket and enjoy a festive Independence Day concert.

title: Carmen
description: Bizet's fiery, passionate tale of love, jealousy, and freedom. Featuring the iconic Habanera and Toreador Song, Carmen remains one of the most beloved and performed operas in the world.

title: Community Youth Showcase
description: Our annual youth showcase spotlighting the next generation of opera talent from the Holly Community Center's vocal training program. Come support our young performers!

title: Holiday Gala: A Night at the Opera
description: Ring in the holiday season with an elegant gala evening of beloved opera favorites, seasonal music, and festive cheer. Formal attire encouraged. Champagne reception from 6:00 PM.
